articles.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
articles.description: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
articles.titleJa: イランの米軍基地攻撃により8億ドルの損害、新たな分析が示す
articles.summary: 米国とイスラエルの作戦開始後、イランによる報復攻撃で米軍使用基地に8億ドルの損害が発生したことが新たな分析で明らかになった。

articles.title: Thousands evacuated as Hawaii faces worst flooding in 20 years
articles.description: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.
articles.titleJa: ハワイが20年ぶりの大規模洪水に直面、数千人が避難
articles.summary: ハワイで20年ぶりの大規模洪水が発生し、数千人が避難。これまでに230人以上が救助されたと当局が発表した。

articles.title: Pentagon restrictions on press violate First Amendment, judge rules
articles.description: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.
articles.titleJa: ペンタゴンの報道制限は憲法修正第1条に違反、裁判官が判決
articles.summary: 裁判官は、国防総省が報道関係者に課していた情報収集に関する特定の規則が、米国憲法修正第1条に違反すると判断した。

articles.title: First photos as BTS make live return in front of huge crowd
articles.description: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook perform together for the first time since October 2022.
articles.titleJa: BTS、大観衆の前でライブ復帰、初の写真公開
articles.summary: BTSのメンバーが2022年10月以来初めて揃ってパフォーマンスを披露し、そのライブ復帰を捉えた写真が公開された。

articles.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
articles.description: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.
articles.titleJa: ロシアのドローン攻撃でウクライナにて2人死亡、米国での協議を前に
articles.summary: 米国での協議を控える中、ロシアのドローン攻撃がザポリージャを襲い、2人が死亡、子供2人を含む2人が負傷したと当局が発表。

articles.title: Socialists battle to hold Paris in key mayoral elections across France
articles.description: Emmanuel Grégoire is facing a challenge from Rachida Dati on the right who is behind in the opinion polls.
articles.titleJa: フランス全土の主要市長選挙、社会党がパリ死守へ苦戦
articles.summary: フランスの主要市長選挙で、社会党はパリでの議席維持に苦戦しており、エマニュエル・グレゴワールが世論調査で後れを取るラシダ・ダティから挑戦を受けている。

articles.title: Elon Musk misled Twitter investors, jury finds
articles.description: A San Francisco jury concludes Musk’s claims in 2022 were damaging to a group of Twitter investors.
articles.titleJa: イーロン・マスクがツイッター投資家を欺いたと陪審が判断
articles.summary: サンフランシスコの陪審が、2022年のイーロン・マスク氏の発言がツイッター投資家グループに損害を与えたと結論付けた。

articles.title: As Islamophobia rises, Australia's Muslims celebrate Eid
articles.description: Recent events abroad and at home have fuelled an ongoing surge of Islamophobia in Australia.
articles.titleJa: イスラム嫌悪が高まる中、オーストラリアのイスラム教徒がイードを祝う
articles.summary: オーストラリアではイスラム嫌悪が深刻化しているが、同国のイスラム教徒はイードを祝っている。国内外の最近の出来事がその感情を煽っている。

articles.title: Ukraine-Hungary oil pipeline row threatens EU loan
articles.description: Kyiv and Budapest disagree on how badly damaged a hub in western Ukraine bombed by Russia really is, as its oil flow remains suspended.
articles.titleJa: ウクライナ・ハンガリー間の石油パイプライン問題がEU融資を脅かす
articles.summary: ロシアによる攻撃で損傷した西ウクライナの石油ハブの被害状況を巡り、キエフとブダペストの意見が対立しており、EU融資が危ぶまれている。

articles.title: Watch: Thick smoke billows from South Korea car parts plant in deadly fire
articles.description: Eleven people were killed and dozens injured when a huge blaze engulfed a car parts factory in the central city of Daejeon.
articles.titleJa: 映像：韓国の自動車部品工場で激しい煙が立ち上る死亡火災
articles.summary: 韓国中部の都市大田にある自動車部品工場で大規模な火災が発生し、11人が死亡、数十人が負傷した。

articles.title: Zimbabwe's Biti reportedly detained amid term‑limit row
articles.description: Proposed changes to ‌the constitution ⁠⁠would extend presidential terms from five years to seven, allowing President Emmerson Mnangagwa to stay in office until 2030 after he was meant to step down in ​2028.
articles.titleJa: ジンバブエのビティ氏、任期制限を巡る論争で拘束報道
articles.summary: ジンバブエで、大統領任期を延長する憲法改正案を巡る論争の中、野党指導者ビティ氏が拘束されたと報じられている。これにより現職大統領の任期延長が可能となるため、国内政治情勢が緊迫している。

articles.title: K-pop giants BTS celebrate return with Seoul concert
articles.description: The South Korean K-pop band BTS has returned to the stage after a nearly four-year break. Huge crowds cheered the group at a massive free concert Saturday, as viewers from around the world tuned in live on Netflix.
articles.titleJa: K-POP大手BTS、ソウル公演で復活を祝う
articles.summary: 韓国の人気K-POPグループBTSが約4年ぶりにステージに復帰し、ソウルで大規模な無料コンサートを開催。世界中のファンがNetflixで生中継を視聴し、大きな盛り上がりを見せた。

articles.title: Down to the last drop: Physics answers a kitchen question
articles.description: How long does it take for the last drop of milk or oil to drip out of the bottle? US scientists have probed this everyday conundrum.
articles.titleJa: 最後の一滴まで：物理学がキッチンの疑問に答える
articles.summary: 牛乳や油の最後の一滴が瓶から落ちるのにかかる時間を巡る、日常の謎について米国の科学者たちが物理学的に解明した研究。

articles.title: Taliban install new diplomat without telling Germany: Report
articles.description: Despite not being recognized by Germany, the Taliban have appointed a new head of the Afghan embassy in Berlin without the German government's approval, broadcaster ARD reported.
articles.titleJa: タリバン、ドイツに無断で新外交官を任命と報道
articles.summary: ドイツが承認していないにもかかわらず、タリバンがベルリンのアフガン大使館に新大使をドイツ政府の同意なしに任命したと報じられた。外交上の問題となっている。

articles.title: Germany's governing CDU, SPD watch latest regional election
articles.description: Voters are set to go to the polls in Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany's wine-growing region and home of Donald Trump's ancestors. It's another test case for Germany's coalition government.
articles.titleJa: ドイツの与党CDUとSPD、最新の地方選挙を注視
articles.summary: ドイツの主要与党であるCDUとSPDが、ラインラント＝プファルツ州で行われる地方選挙の結果に注目している。この選挙は、ドイツの連立政権にとって試金石となる。

articles.title: US: Hawaii hit by historic flooding, more rain coming
articles.description: Thousands of people on the Hawaiian island of Oahu have been evacuated as winter storms dump masses of water on its already saturated soil. Meteorologists say more heavy rains are expected over the coming days.
articles.titleJa: 米国：ハワイが歴史的な洪水に見舞われる、さらなる雨も予想
articles.summary: ハワイのオアフ島で冬の嵐により記録的な豪雨が発生し、数千人が避難。土壌は飽和状態にあり、今後数日間さらなる大雨が予想され、警戒が続いている。

articles.title: Israeli military said strikes on Iran will ramp up, as UK promises Cyprus it won't be used in operations: Iran latest
articles.description: Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz said US and Israeli strikes on Iran would "increase significantly" in the coming week. Katz's comments come after US President Trump said he was considering "winding down" the war.
articles.titleJa: イスラエル軍、イランへの攻撃を強化すると表明、英国はキプロスを軍事作戦に使用しないと約束：イラン情勢最新
articles.summary: イスラエル国防相がイランへの攻撃を大幅に強化すると発言。米国とイスラエルの共同作戦が激化する可能性があり、地域的な緊張が高まっている。英国もキプロスを軍事作戦に使用しないと約束。

articles.title: Czechs plan major rally as MPs mull 'foreign agent' law
articles.description: Prague could see one of its largest demonstrations in recent years on Saturday. Many Czechs are preparing to protest what organizers of the rally describe as democratic backsliding under Prime Minister Andrej Babis.
articles.titleJa: チェコ、議員が「外国代理人法」を検討する中、大規模な集会を計画
articles.summary: チェコで、議員が「外国代理人法」の審議を進める中、大規模な抗議デモがプラハで計画されている。デモは、バビシュ首相下での民主主義の後退に反対するものだ。

articles.title: Why Syria's new alcohol ban is about much more than beer
articles.description: This week's ban on alcohol in Damascus has sparked a debate among Syrians. Some say it's about more than just being able to have a drink: It's about the country's future governance, personal freedoms and community unity.
articles.titleJa: シリアの新しい酒類禁止令がビール以上の意味を持つ理由
articles.summary: ダマスカスで施行された酒類禁止令がシリア国内で大きな議論を呼んでいる。この禁止令は、単なる飲酒の自由だけでなく、国の統治、個人の自由、そして共同体の結束というより広範な問題に関わるとされている。

articles.title: Germany news: Merz to call Trump amid Hormuz standoff
articles.description: The US president has ramped up pressure on European NATO partners to help patrol the Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, more than 500 far-right extremists have yet to be arrested in Germany. DW has the latest.
articles.titleJa: ドイツニュース：メルツ、ホルムズ海峡の膠着状態でトランプと電話会談へ
articles.summary: ホルムズ海峡の警備に関して米国大統領がNATO加盟国に圧力を強める中、ドイツのメルツ氏がトランプ氏と会談予定。国内では500人以上の極右過激派が未逮捕の状態であり、ドイツは国際問題と国内治安問題に直面している。

articles.title: Madagascar’s military ruler decrees that ministers must pass lie detector tests
articles.description:
Michael Randrianirina, who sacked PM and cabinet without explanation, claims measure is to root out corruption
Madagascar’s military president has said new ministers will have to pass lie detector tests to root out corrupt candidates, after he dismissed the prime minister and cabinet without explanation earlier this month.
Michael Randrianirina came to power in a coup in October after weeks of youth-led protests under the banner “Gen Z Madagascar”. However, young people were quickly disenchanted by his choice of government officials, which they saw as being part of the old, corrupt elite.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: マダガスカルの軍事指導者、閣僚に嘘発見器テストを義務付ける布告
articles.summary: マダガスカルの軍事大統領は、汚職撲滅のため、新閣僚に嘘発見器テストを義務付けると発表した。これは首相と閣僚を解任した後の措置。

articles.title: Some of the world’s poorest countries to lose UK aid due to 56% budget cut
articles.description:
UK’s bilateral aid to African countries, which funds areas such as schools and clinics, to be cut by almost £900m by 2028-29
Some of the world’s poorest countries will lose out on UK aid that funds programmes such as schools and clinics, due to budget cuts set out by the foreign secretary.
The UK’s bilateral aid to African countries will be reduced by almost £900m by 2028-29 – a 56% cut – as part of more than £6bn in cuts which are funding an increase in defence spending.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 世界の最貧国の一部、予算56%削減により英国からの援助を失う
articles.summary: 英国は国防費増額のため、アフリカ諸国への二国間援助を約9億ポンド（56%）削減すると発表。世界の最貧国の一部が学校や診療所への資金を失うことになる。

articles.title: Woman has sentence quashed by Tanzania court after over a decade on death row
articles.description:
Lemi Limbu, who has severe intellectual disabilities, remains in prison and will now face retrial for the murder of her daughter
A woman with severe intellectual disabilities in Tanzania has had her conviction and death sentence quashed after spending more than a decade in prison awaiting execution.
Lemi Limbu, now in her early 30s, was convicted of the murder of her daughter in 2015. On 4 March, a court in Shinyanga, northern Tanzania, declared she can appeal. She will face a retrial, but a date has yet to be set.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: タンザニアの裁判所、死刑囚の女性の判決を10年以上ぶりに破棄
articles.summary: タンザニアで重度の知的障害を持つ女性が、10年以上死刑囚として過ごした後、殺人の有罪判決と死刑が破棄された。再審が予定されている。

articles.title: Jihadist violence in Nigeria and DRC rose sharply last year even as global deaths from terror fell
articles.description:
Nigeria had largest increase in terrorism-related deaths, ranking fourth in global index behind Pakistan, Burkina Faso and Niger
Jihadist violence rose sharply in Nigeria and Democratic Republic of Congo last year, even as global deaths from terrorism dropped to their lowest level in a decade, according to a new report.
Nigeria recorded the largest increase in terrorism deaths globally in 2025, with fatalities rising by 46% from 513 in 2024 to 750, placing it fourth in the Global Terrorism Index, behind Pakistan, Burkina Faso and Niger.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ナイジェリアとコンゴ民主共和国でジハード主義者の暴力が昨年急増、世界のテロ死亡者数は減少も
articles.summary: 報告書によると、昨年、世界のテロによる死亡者数は過去10年で最低だったが、ナイジェリアとコンゴ民主共和国ではジハード主義者による暴力が急増。ナイジェリアは死亡者数が46%増加した。

articles.title: Belgian court sends ex-diplomat, 93, to trial over 1961 murder of Congo leader
articles.description:
Family of then PM, Patrice Lumumba, welcome decision to charge Étienne Davignon as ‘beginning of a reckoning’ 
A former Belgian diplomat, 93, should stand trial over alleged complicity in the 1961 murder of Patrice Lumumba, the first prime minister of what was then the newly independent Congolese state, a Brussels court has ruled.
Étienne Davignon, the only person still alive among 10 Belgians the Lumumba family accuses of involvement in the killing, is charged with participation in war crimes.
The illegal transfer of Lumumba and his associates from Léopoldville (now Kinshasa) to Katanga.
The “humiliating and degrading treatment” of the men.
Depriving them of a fair trial.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ベルギーの裁判所、93歳の元外交官を1961年のコンゴ指導者殺害の件で裁判にかける決定
articles.summary: ベルギーの裁判所は、93歳の元外交官が1961年のコンゴ初代首相パトリス・ルムンバ殺害への共謀容疑で裁判にかけられるべきだと判断した。ルムンバ家は「清算の始まり」と歓迎している。

articles.title: Canadian mother and daughter ‘traumatized’ by ICE detainment, husband says
articles.description:
Tania Warner and Ayla, her seven-year-old with autism, sent to notorious Texas detention center and told to ‘self-deport’

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

A Canadian woman and her seven-year-old daughter with autism who have been held by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for nearly a week have been transferred to a notorious detention center and asked to “self-deport”, according to her husband, who said the pair had been “traumatized” by the experience.
Tania Warner and her daughter Ayla Luca, originally from British Columbia, moved to the US five years ago, when Warner married Edward Warner, a US citizen.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カナダ人母娘、ICE拘留で「精神的苦痛」を負うと夫が語る
articles.summary: カナダ人女性とその自閉症の7歳の娘が米移民税関捜査局（ICE）に拘留され、悪名高いテキサス州の施設に移送された。夫は「精神的苦痛を受けている」と語った。

articles.title: Gabbard testimony on Puerto Rico voting machines raises questions about role of Venezuela conspiracy theory
articles.description:
National intelligence director said voting machine seizure was requested by US attorney in Puerto Rico – who’s been trying to revive 2020 election conspiracy theory
When the US director of national intelligence (DNI), Tulsi Gabbard, testified on Thursday that her office seized voting machines from Puerto Rico, she said it was at the request of the office of the US attorney in Puerto Rico. Left unsaid was that the prosecutor, as the Guardian previously reported, has been the center of a push by Donald Trump supporters to revive a long discredited conspiracy theory purporting to link Venezuela to Trump’s 2020 electoral defeat.
Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro, the conspiracy theory maintains, controlled electronic voting machines worldwide and remotely manipulated results in 2020 to deprive Trump of a presidential victory.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ギャバード氏のプエルトリコ投票機証言、ベネズエラ陰謀論の役割に疑問を呈す
articles.summary: 米国家情報長官ギャバード氏がプエルトリコからの投票機押収を証言。これは2020年選挙でのトランプ氏敗北とベネズエラを関連付ける陰謀論を再燃させようとする動きと関連している。

articles.title: Mexico’s monarch butterfly population jumps 64%, offering hope for at-risk species
articles.description:
The insects covered its largest area since 2018, despite threats from habitat loss, climate crisis and pesticides
The population of monarch butterflies in Mexico increased 64% this winter, compared with the same period in 2025, offering a glimmer of hope for an insect considered at risk of extinction.
The figures, released this week by the World Wildlife Fund (WWF) Mexico, showed that the area occupied by monarchs expanded to 2.93 hectares (7.24 acres) of forest from 1.79 hectares (4.42 acres) the previous winter, the largest coverage since 2018.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: メキシコのオオカバマダラ個体数が64%急増、絶滅危惧種に希望
articles.summary: メキシコにおけるオオカバマダラの個体数がこの冬に64%増加し、絶滅危惧種にとって希望の光となった。生息地の喪失や気候変動などの脅威がある中、2018年以来最大の生息地面積を記録した。

articles.title: Delcy Rodríguez replaces Venezuela’s top military commanders
articles.description:
Interim president announces changes after firing defence minister, who was close to Maduro, the leader ousted by US 
Venezuela’s interim president has said she has replaced all her senior military commanders, the latest in a flurry of changes since the US ousted Nicolás Maduro.
Delcy Rodríguez announced the changes in a social media post a day after firing the long-serving defence minister, who had been close to Maduro, and replacing him with a former intelligence chief.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: デルシー・ロドリゲス氏、ベネズエラの最高軍司令官を交代
articles.summary: ベネズエラの暫定大統領デルシー・ロドリゲス氏は、米国に追放されたマドゥロ前大統領に近い国防大臣を解任した翌日、全ての最高軍司令官を交代させたと発表した。

articles.title: Seven-year-old Canadian girl with autism and mother detained by ICE in Texas
articles.description:
Mother and child held in notorious Rio Grande Valley detention centre despite presenting visa, family says
A Canadian mother and her seven-year-old daughter, who has autism, have been detained by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in Texas since Saturday, family members have said.
Relatives of Tania Warner and her daughter Ayla Lucas say they were detained unlawfully. They are uncertain about what problem ICE found with their immigration paperwork.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 7歳のカナダ人自閉症の少女と母親、テキサス州でICEに拘留される
articles.summary: カナダ人の母親と自閉症の7歳の娘が、テキサス州の悪名高いリオグランデバレー拘留センターで米国移民税関捜査局（ICE）に拘留されていることが家族の証言で明らかになった。

articles.title: Thrilling Finishes Light Up Day 2 in Tbilisi
articles.description: An electric Day 2 in Tbilisi saw Haruka Kaju take gold in -63kg, Leonardo Valeriani claim his first Grand Slam title, and Madina Taimazova return to the top. Vedat Albayrak sealed victory in the final seconds, while the Georgian crowd celebrated Giorgi Loladze’s bronze.
articles.titleJa: スリリングな決勝戦がトビリシの2日目を盛り上げる
articles.summary: トビリシで開催された柔道の大会2日目、梶原遥が金、バレリアーニが初のグランドスラムタイトルを獲得。マディナ・タイマゾワが復帰し、アルバイラクが勝利を収めた。

articles.title: Latest news bulletin | March 21st, 2026 – Evening
articles.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this March 21st, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.
articles.titleJa: 最新ニュース速報 | 2026年3月21日 – 夜
articles.summary: 2026年3月21日夜の最新ニュース速報。ヨーロッパ内外の主要ニュース、世界、ビジネス、エンタメ、政治、文化、旅行など幅広いトピックを伝える。

articles.title: All Iranian officials and commanders killed in the past nine months
articles.description: From Basij commanders to the Supreme Leader, some of the Islamic Republic’s most important figures were killed in two waves of attacks by Israel and the United States against Iran in the past nine months.
articles.titleJa: 過去9ヶ月間に殺害されたイランの全政府高官と司令官
articles.summary: 過去9ヶ月間、イスラエルと米国によるイランへの攻撃で、バシージ司令官から最高指導者まで、イスラム共和国の重要人物が多数殺害された。

articles.title: K-pop BTS makes comeback in Seoul: 260,000 fans, millions watching on screens
articles.description: Numerous roads closed, hundreds of thousands of fans on site and millions watching on Netflix: the K-pop band’s comeback is a mega event.
articles.titleJa: K-POPグループBTSがソウルでカムバック: 26万人のファン、数百万人が画面で視聴
articles.summary: ソウルでK-POPグループBTSのカムバック公演が開催。多数の道路が閉鎖され、26万人のファンが集結。数百万人がNetflixで視聴するメガイベントとなった。

articles.title: Russia launches 154 drones over Ukraine, killing a couple at home and injuring their children
articles.description: A home in the southerneastern city of Zaporizhzhia was struck in an overnight Russian attack, killing a couple and leaving their two children injured.
articles.titleJa: ロシアがウクライナにドローン154機を発射、自宅の夫婦を殺害し子供が負傷
articles.summary: ロシアがウクライナにドローン154機を発射。ザポリージャの住宅が攻撃を受け、夫婦が死亡し2人の子供が負傷した。

articles.title: Iranian attack on the Diego Garcia military base: its location and strategic role
articles.description: Iranian forces have attempted a missile strike on the UK-US base of Diego Garcia in the Indian Ocean, previously thought to lie beyond the range of Iran's missiles.
articles.titleJa: イランによるディエゴガルシア軍事基地攻撃：その位置と戦略的役割
articles.summary: イラン軍がインド洋にある英米のディエゴガルシア基地へのミサイル攻撃を試みた。同基地はこれまでイランのミサイルの射程外と考えられていた。

articles.title: World Poetry Day: Inspiring words and thoughts from Euronews Culture's poet-in-residence

articles.title: AI investment and Middle East conflict shape outlook for global trade
articles.description: The outlook for world trade in 2026 will be shaped by two powerful and opposite forces. On the one hand, the extraordinary momentum of investment in artificial intelligence (AI) continues to energize global demand for high-tech goods and digitally delivered services. On the other hand, the conflict in the Middle East – and the resulting spike in energy and transport costs – could weigh heavily on world trade and output.
articles.titleJa: AI投資と中東紛争が世界貿易の見通しを左右する
articles.summary: 2026年の世界貿易は、AI投資の勢いと中東紛争によるエネルギー・輸送コスト上昇という二つの対立する力によって形成される見通し。AIは需要を喚起するが、紛争は貿易と生産に大きな負担となる見込み。

articles.title: Middle East conflict weighs further on slowing trade outlook
articles.description: World trade is set to slow in 2026 following stronger than expected growth in 2025 on the back of surging trade in AI-enabling products. WTO economists warn that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East could further reduce trade growth if energy prices remain elevated, noting that it would also put pressure on food supplies and services trade due to travel and transport disruptions. Prospects could still improve if the conflict ends quickly and the boom in AI spending continues.
articles.titleJa: 中東紛争、減速する貿易見通しにさらに重くのしかかる
articles.summary: WTOは、2026年の世界貿易が中東紛争によるエネルギー価格高騰と輸送混乱で減速し、食料・サービス貿易に圧力をかけると警告。AI投資は好調だが、紛争終結で改善の可能性も指摘。

articles.title: Arbitrator to set level of trade suspension in Indonesia–EU palm oil biofuels dispute
articles.description: A WTO arbitrator was tasked on 19 March with determining the level of trade suspension Indonesia may impose on the European Union in the palm oil biofuels dispute, following Indonesia’s request to suspend concessions worth US$ 2.8–5.6 billion annually. At the same meeting, the Dispute Settlement Body (DSB) also agreed to the EU’s second request for a panel to review Chinese measures on global licensing terms for standard essential patents.
articles.titleJa: インドネシアとEU間のパーム油バイオ燃料紛争、仲裁人が貿易停止水準を決定へ
articles.summary: WTO仲裁人が、インドネシアがEUに最大56億ドルの譲許停止を要求したパーム油バイオ燃料紛争の貿易停止水準を決定する。EUによる中国の特許措置審査要請も合意された。

articles.title: Participants launch MC14 environmental sustainability package, chart new phase of action
articles.description: On 19 March, ahead of the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Yaoundé, 79 WTO members participating in the Trade and Environmental Sustainability Structured Discussions (TESSD) unveiled a package of outcome documents showcasing progress achieved over the past five years and highlighting the group’s substantive analytical work across several workstreams since MC13. Members also expressed their readiness to shift towards priority areas and deliver concrete actions after MC14.
articles.titleJa: 参加国がMC14環境持続可能性パッケージを発表、新たな行動段階へ
articles.summary: MC14に先立ち、WTO加盟79カ国が貿易と環境の持続可能性に関する成果文書を発表。過去5年間の進捗を示し、MC14後の優先分野への移行と具体的行動への準備を表明した。

articles.title: Canada launches safeguard investigation on certain vegetable goods

articles.titleJa: カナダ、特定の野菜品目に対するセーフガード調査を開始

articles.title: Market Access Committee adopts decision on recording the resolution of trade concerns
articles.description: The WTO's Committee on Market Access (CMA) agreed at its 16-17 March meeting on procedures to improve how the resolution of trade concerns are recorded in the Committee. Thirty-three trade concerns were raised at the two-day meeting, of which seven were raised for the first time. The Committee also endorsed a communication to the World Customs Organization asking to improve the tariff classification of menstrual products.
articles.titleJa: 市場アクセス委員会、貿易懸念の解決記録に関する決定を採択

articles.title: WTO launches applications for 2026 Young Trade Leaders Programme
articles.description: The WTO is inviting applications for the 2026 Young Trade Leaders Programme, an initiative aimed at fostering a better understanding of the WTO's work and international trade among young people and creating a network of Young Trade Leaders around the world.
articles.titleJa: WTO、2026年ヤング・トレード・リーダーズ・プログラムの申請受付を開始

articles.title: DDG Zhang welcomes 2026 cohorts of participants in two technical assistance programmes
articles.description: A ceremony held at the WTO headquarters on 12 March marked the launch of the 2026 edition of two WTO technical assistance programmes, the French Irish Mission Programme (FIMiP) and the Netherlands Talent Programme (NTP). Welcoming participants, Deputy Director-General Xiangchen Zhang highlighted the timeliness of these programmes, with the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference due to take place from 26 to 29 March in Yaoundé, Cameroon.
articles.titleJa: 張副事務局長、2026年技術支援プログラムの参加者グループを歓迎
articles.summary: WTOの張副事務局長が、2026年版の仏アイルランド・ミッション・プログラムとオランダ・タレント・プログラムの参加者を歓迎。これらはカメルーンの第14回WTO閣僚会議に先立って開始される。

articles.title: Members review record SPS trade concerns; group weighs transparency challenges, solutions
articles.description: Meeting on 11-13 March, the Committee on Sanitary and Phytosanitary (SPS) Measures reviewed 76 SPS-related trade concerns raised by WTO members, a record for the committee. Earlier in the week, the Committee's Transparency Working Group met to consider possible improvements to notifications in order to facilitate tracking, disseminating and engaging on SPS requirements.
articles.titleJa: メンバーが過去最多のSPS貿易懸念を審査。透明性課題と解決策を検討
articles.summary: SPS措置委員会が過去最多の76件のSPS関連貿易懸念を審査。透明性ワーキンググループは、通知改善によるSPS要件の追跡・普及・関与促進の可能性を検討した。

articles.title: Launch of third phase of EIF activities at MC14 high-level event
articles.description: A high-level event marking the launch of the Enhanced Integrated Framework’s (EIF) third phase of activities will take place on the margins of the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Yaoundé, Cameroon, on 25 March. The EIF’s work is dedicated to harnessing trade and investment for prosperity and sustainable economic growth in least-developed countries (LDCs).
articles.titleJa: MC14ハイレベルイベントでEIF活動の第3段階が開始
articles.summary: カメルーンの第14回WTO閣僚会議にて、後発開発途上国の繁栄と持続可能な経済成長を目指すEIFの第3段階活動が開始される。貿易と投資の活用を重視。
